title: spiraea ovalifolia
intro: Spiraea ovalifolia, also known as the Maybush or Maybush Spiraea, is a flowering plant species in the rose family native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Spiraea ovalifolia include its ability to treat fever, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
